title: crotalaria sagittalis var. fruticosa
intro: Crotalaria sagittalis var. fruticosa, also known as bush rattlebox, is a shrubby plant belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Crotalaria sagittalis var. fruticosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural laxative. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed as a tea or applied topically to the skin for its purported medicinal benefits.
